title: lannea ornifolia
intro: Lannea ornifolia, also known as the bird plum tree, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Anacardiaceae family. The medicinal properties of Lannea ornifolia lie in its bark, leaves, and fruits, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Lannea ornifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and its extracts have also been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
